title: stelis chlorantha
intro: Stelis chlorantha, also known as the green-flowered stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis chlorantha include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of Stelis chlorantha include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
